metadata.name: Segment Customers for a Marketing Campaign

description: A marketer wants to create a customer segment of 'high-value' customers for an exclusive offer.

nodes.task_description: Define the criteria for a 'high-value' customer (e.g., lifetime spend > $1000 and at least 3 orders in the last year).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly sets the filtering parameters.

nodes.task_description: Query the customer database to generate a list of all customers who meet these criteria.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully generates the customer segment.

nodes.task_description: Save the generated list as a new audience segment named 'VIP Customers'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent saves the segment for future use.
